NAME: Name
LIST_OF_THE_ORGANIZATIONS_CREATED_YOU_CA: List of the organizations created, you can also create a new one on the button aside.
LIST_OF_THE_ORGANIZATIONS_SITE_SITE_CAN_: List of the organization's site. Site can be department, sector, sub-organization, among others.
THIS_IS_A_POSITION_SIMULATOR_GIVE_AT_LEA: This is a position simulator, give at least one value to a beacon (0 to -100) and choose a layer to simulate. The ideia is to plot the Equipment/Asset on the place of the strongest beacon found.
LIST_OF_ORGANIZATION_USERS_YOU_MUST_CREA: List of organization users. You must create a Site before to invite a new user.
THE_GENERATED_PDF_WILL_SHOW_THE_LAST_10_: The generated PDF will show the last 10 readings of the site's equipment tracking.
LIST_OF_EMAILS_TO_BE_SEND: List of emails to be send
LIST_OF_ORGANIZATION_ALERTS_YOU_MUST_CRE: List of organization alerts. You must create an equipment before create an alert.
SETUP_THE_TRIGGER_IF_THE_CONDITION_MATCH: Setup the trigger, if the condition match, the alert will be triggered.
SETUP_AN_ALERT_WHICH_WILL_BE_SENT_WHEN_T: Setup an alert which will be sent when the conditions are met.
SELECT_THE_USERS_WHICH_WILL_RECEIVE_THE_: select the users which will receive the alert
TYPE_A_MESSAGE_WHICH_WILL_BE_SENT: type a message which will be sent
FILL_UP_THE_FIELDS_WITH_INFORMATION_ABOU: Fill up the fields with information about the new sensor.
TYPE_OR_SCAN_YOUR_SENSOR_CODE: Type or scan your sensor code
CHOOSE_THE_SITE_WHERE_THE_SENSOR_WILL_BE: Choose the site where the sensor will be placed
FILL_UP_THE_FIELDS_WITH_INFORMATION_ABOU: Fill up the fields with information about the new equipment.
TYPE_OR_SCAN_YOUR_SERIE_NUMBER: Type or scan your serie number
CHOOSE_THE_ASSET_WHICH_THE_EQUIPMENT_IS_: Choose the asset which the equipment is related
MOVE_THE_MAP_PIN_OR_TYPE_THE_SITE_ADDRES: move the map pin or type the site address
ADD_A_SITE_FOR_YOUR_ORGANIZATION: Add a site for your organization.
